name: letter_date_present
expression: letter_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(letter_date)) > 0
description: letter_date is required for Insurance Claim Denial Letter extraction.

name: claim_number_present
expression: claim_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(claim_number)) > 0
description: claim_number is required for Insurance Claim Denial Letter extraction.

name: policy_number_present
expression: policy_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(policy_number)) > 0
description: policy_number is required for Insurance Claim Denial Letter extraction.

name: denial_reason_present
expression: denial_reason IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(denial_reason)) > 0
description: denial_reason is required for Insurance Claim Denial Letter extraction.
